title: Ability to sync a column template for all boards its linked to, including dropdown and status columns.
excerpt: Our organization frequently uses column templates for common columns used amongst multiple boards in our organization, such as departments, position titles, etc. There are frequently updates to these columns and it would…

posts.author: cacero (Corina)
posts.cookedHtml: Our organization frequently uses column templates for common columns used amongst multiple boards in our organization, such as departments, position titles, etc. There are frequently updates to these columns and it would be helpful to be able to update the template and “push changes” to all boards rather than have to maintain individually. Additionally, the ability to have easier visibility into editing a drop-down column would be helpful. When you end and delete something it takes you back to the top and you have to keep scrolling to where you were. With 500 options, this is time consuming.
